description_long: This is a compact quadcopter drone with a streamlined, angular body made primarily of matte gray plastic and lightweight metal. It features four extended arms, each supporting a large black propeller, arranged in an 'X' configuration for stable flight. The front of the drone houses a prominent camera gimbal system, likely for high-resolution aerial photography or video capture. The body is aerodynamically shaped, with subtle panel lines and a few visible access hatches or covers. The landing gear consists of short, fixed legs integrated into the arms, providing ground clearance for the camera and propellers. The overall design suggests a modern, consumer-grade drone suitable for urban aerial operations.
description: A sleek, gray quadcopter drone with four black propellers and a front-mounted camera gimbal, designed for aerial photography and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera gimbal and symmetrical propeller arrangement.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the arm structure and propeller blades.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the 'X' rotor configuration and compact body shape.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back panel and the fixed landing legs.
